title: Disable Ores Smelting
description: disable some ore smelting recipes to prevent waste
body:
<details>
<summary>Datapack Introduction (Machine translation)</summary>
This datapack disables some smelting recipes for ores that result in waste, while keeping the smelting recipes for non-wasteful and essential ores.

List of ores with disabled recipes:
- **1.13+:** Coal, Copper, Diamond, Emerald, Lapis Lazuli, Redstone
- **1.18+:** Overworld Gold, Iron

This datapack supports the mainstream versions from 1.13+.
</details>

<details>
<summary>数据包介绍</summary>
该数据包会禁用部分会浪费的矿石烧炼配方，同时保留不会浪费的、必需的烧炼配方。

禁用配方的矿物种类列表：
- **1.13+：** 煤炭、铜、钻石、绿宝石、青金石、红石
- **1.18+：** 主世界金、铁

该数据包支持1.13+的主流版本。
</details>
